note: Synthetic readable CVs to test decision calibration, explanation quality, standout detection, and dedup (not retrieval). Run each in Cowork with the skill installed, using job-description.txt as the JD and its must/nice/deal-breaker lines as criteria.

evals.name: clear-interview
evals.prompt: Using fixtures/job-description.txt as the role, evaluate fixtures/01_clear_interview.txt and give a decision with a one-line reason.
evals.expected_output: Interview. All must-haves clearly met: 5+ yrs office management, Hebrew+English, high-tech office ownership, ERP tools.

evals.name: clear-reject-offrole
evals.prompt: Using fixtures/job-description.txt as the role, evaluate fixtures/02_clear_reject_offrole.txt and give a decision with a one-line reason.
evals.expected_output: Reject. Off-role: applied as a game developer with no admin/office-management experience.

evals.name: genuine-borderline
evals.prompt: Using fixtures/job-description.txt as the role, evaluate fixtures/03_borderline_hold.txt and give a decision with a one-line reason.
evals.expected_output: Hold. ~1.5 yrs (below the 2-yr floor), basic English, no high-tech/ERP — genuine borderline, should not be auto-rejected or auto-interviewed.

evals.name: standout-detection
evals.prompt: Using fixtures/job-description.txt, evaluate fixtures/04_standout.txt. Give the decision, an explained reason (matched / missing / confidence / what-would-change-it), and say whether this is a Standout.
evals.expected_output: Interview, Confidence High, Standout = Yes. Exceeds the bar: 7 yrs senior office/ops experience, scaled an office 15->120, owns Priority ERP and a budget and a team. Explanation names the matched must-haves; nothing material missing.

evals.name: dedup-cross-source
evals.prompt: The tracker already contains Noa Berkovich (fixtures/01_clear_interview.txt) as Interview. Now process fixtures/05_duplicate_of_01.txt, which is the same person applying via LinkedIn. What should happen?
evals.expected_output: Recognized as a duplicate of Noa Berkovich (same email/name/phone). Do NOT create a second decision row or double-count; keep the existing Interview, note 'duplicate of Noa Berkovich (already Interview, LinkedIn)', and list under Duplicates in the digest.

evals.name: explanation-quality-borderline
evals.prompt: Using fixtures/job-description.txt, evaluate fixtures/03_borderline_hold.txt. The reason must include what matched, what's missing, a Confidence level, and the single thing that would change the decision.
evals.expected_output: Hold, Confidence Medium/Low. Matched: some admin/reception experience. Missing: ~1.5 yrs (under the 2-yr floor), basic English, no high-tech/ERP. Would-change-it: moves to Interview if 2+ yrs relevant experience and professional English are confirmed.
